headline: Andorra first-baseline rotation confirmation. Composite 62.5 sustained. Established band. Pyrenean co-principality with stable parliamentary democracy, EU Association Agreement signed December 2023, continued tourism-finance economic posture. No active news in window. First-baseline established at the Established band classification.
key_evidence: Stable parliamentary co-principality; constitutional democracy since 1993.
EU Association Agreement signed December 2023 — structural deepening of European integration.
Tourism-finance economic posture continues; financial-secrecy reforms post-2018 Banca Privada d'Andorra resolution remain in force.

scoring_rationale.EQU: 3 first-baseline. Small population reduces statistical certainty on EQU; abortion remains illegal — held at 3.0.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4 first-baseline. EU Association Agreement supports strong international cooperation posture.

math_check.validator_check: Exact reconstruction; first-baseline confirmation; Established band sustained.

negativeSignals: Abortion remains illegal — major EQU constraint; small-state economy carries tourism-finance dependency.
positiveSignals: EU Association Agreement structural deepening; financial-secrecy reform stability; stable democratic institutions.
sector_context: Andorra is among the European microstates first-baseline establishments this cycle. Established band classification confirmed. Routine staleness cycle going forward.
open_actions_carried: Watch: EU Association Agreement implementation milestones
